entries.reason: Feet were cut off in the original. Regenerated with explicit full-body framing rules using east_attack as a reference for character consistency.
entries.oldPrompt:
POSE (east_spell): East-facing. Both palms held forward cupping a swirling orange-yellow flame, hood up, serene face.

(Generated via SpriteCook MCP using the canonical art_direction prompt. Feet ended up cropped — framing rule was not strictly enforced.)
entries.newPrompt:
IDENTITY: Human WOMAN, about 26 years old, long wavy auburn-red hair, warm brown eyes, calm confident adult face.

OUTFIT: Deep-red hooded robe with a yellow-gold flame emblem on the chest, gold trim along the hood and front seam. Hood worn up.

WEAPONS: No staff. A plume of orange-yellow fire flickers in the palms.

POSE (east_spell): East-facing side profile. Both palms held forward cupping a swirling orange-yellow flame, hood up, serene face. Mid-cast.

FRAMING (non-negotiable): FULL-BODY head-to-toe. Feet fully visible with clearance above the bottom edge (NEVER cropped). Head with headroom above the hair. Figure occupies ~85% of canvas height, centered. Match cross-roster scale: same pixel height as every other adult humanoid in this sprite set.

PROPORTIONS: realistic adult human, head ~1/7.5 of body, tall and slender adult legs, NOT chibi, NOT bobblehead.

FOOTWEAR: leather/cloth shoes — never barefoot.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text, bright evenly-lit, match palette of reference.

NEGATIVE: no staff, no sword, no bow, no skull, no male features, no beard, no blue, no ice, no scene background, no white background, no solid color background.
